name: Asus PA329CRV (IPS Panel, Res: 3840X2160, 60Hz, 5ms GTG ) 4K
highlights: ASUS ProArt Display PA329CRV is a 31
5-inch 4K UHD professional monitor designed for creators, featuring 100% sRGB and 98% DCI-P3 color coverage, Calman Verified factory calibration with ΔE < 2 color accuracy, and support for HDR10

With a peak brightness of 400 nits, Adaptive-Sync, USB-C 96W power delivery, and ergonomic stand adjustments, it’s ideal for photographers, video editors, and designers seeking precise color and seamless workflow
